channel.title: GitHub Copilot Bulletin — English / Monthly long / Admins
channel.description: Latest GitHub Copilot updates for Admins (Monthly long, English)

item.title: Copilot Bulletin Monthly (Long) #1 — March 2026 · Admins Edition
item.description: March brought a clear message for Copilot administrators: governance tooling is catching up with the pace of agentic innovation. New enterprise session filters, agent hooks for policy enforcement, and a security architecture built on zero-trust principles give admins granular control over how agents operate across their organizations. Meanwhile, Copilot code review crossed 60 million reviews with 12,000+ organizations running automatic reviews — signaling that AI-assisted quality workflows are becoming standard practice. GPT-5.4 and auto model selection both landed this month, each requiring admin enablement through policy settings.
